subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and I'd love to get a proper meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Here are some slots that work well on our end:

  • Tuesday, 21 April 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 22 April 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 23 April 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Any of those work for you? Just let me know and I'll send over a calendar invite.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information externally. That said, once we've had our initial call and there's a clear path forward, I'm happy to help facilitate the right introductions on our side.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
